moments.title: World Cup 2026 Group Stage Heats Up
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026, co-hosted by USA, Canada, and Mexico, is well into its group stage, running from June 11 to July 19, with matches happening daily.

angles.name: General Excitement
angles.copy: Who are you backing in the World Cup group stages? Every match is crucial as teams battle for a spot in the knockouts!

angles.name: Tonight's Match
angles.copy: It's Australia vs USA tonight in the World Cup! Who's taking the win? Kick-off is 9 PM UTC / 10 PM BST.

moments.title: BST Hyde Park Kicks Off Next Week
moments.blurb: American Express presents BST Hyde Park returns next weekend, starting June 27, bringing a stellar lineup of global superstars to London's iconic park until July 12.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: London, get ready! BST Hyde Park kicks off next Saturday with Garth Brooks, followed by ATEEZ, Maroon 5, Mumford & Sons, Duran Duran, and Lewis Capaldi. Who are you most excited to see?

angles.name: Duran Duran Highlight
angles.copy: Duran Duran are headlining BST Hyde Park on July 5th with Scissor Sisters and Nile Rodgers & Chic! An absolute must-see for 80s legends.

moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Approaches
moments.blurb: The world-famous Wimbledon Championships are set to begin on Monday, June 29, running until July 12, bringing elite tennis action to the All England Club.

angles.name: Countdown
angles.copy: It's almost time for strawberries, cream, and world-class tennis! Wimbledon 2026 starts on June 29. Who's your pick for the trophy this year?

angles.name: Tennis Fever
angles.copy: The grass courts are almost ready! Wimbledon is just around the corner, bringing two weeks of unmissable action. Will we see any British champions?

moments.title: Summer Solstice This Sunday
moments.blurb: The Summer Solstice, marking the longest day and shortest night of the year in the Northern Hemisphere, occurs this Sunday, June 21, at 9:24 AM BST.

angles.name: Longest Day
angles.copy: Happy almost Summer Solstice! Enjoy the longest day of the year this Sunday, June 21st. How will you be making the most of the extra daylight?

angles.name: Stonehenge Connection
angles.copy: Thousands will gather at Stonehenge this Sunday for the Summer Solstice sunrise. A truly ancient tradition marking the start of astronomical summer.

moments.title: New UK Singles Chart Revealed
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart is updated every Friday, bringing a fresh look at the nation's most popular tracks.

angles.name: Chart Friday
angles.copy: It's Official Chart Friday! Has your favourite track made it to the top, or is there a new number one? Tune in to find out!

angles.name: New Music
angles.copy: What's hitting the top of the charts this week? Friday means a brand new Official UK Singles Chart is out now!

moments.title: Happy 64th to Paula Abdul
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer, dancer, and choreographer Paula Abdul celebrates her 64th birthday today, June 19. Born in 1962.

angles.name: Forever Your Girl
angles.copy: Forever Your Girl is 64 today! Happy Birthday to the incredible Paula Abdul, still Straight Up iconic. What's your favourite Paula track?

angles.name: Dance Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 64th Birthday to the legendary Paula Abdul! From pop hits to iconic choreography, she's done it all.

moments.title: Ann Wilson of Heart Turns 76
moments.blurb: The powerful voice of Heart, Ann Wilson, celebrates her 76th birthday today, June 19. Born in 1950.

angles.name: Rock Legend
angles.copy: Happy 76th Birthday to the legendary Ann Wilson of Heart! Her incredible vocals have given us some of rock's greatest anthems.

angles.name: Magic Man
angles.copy: Barracuda! Crazy On You! What's your favourite Heart track? Wishing a fantastic 76th Birthday to the one and only Ann Wilson.

moments.title: Lana Del Rey's 41st Birthday
moments.blurb: Acclaimed singer-songwriter Lana Del Rey, known for her cinematic and melancholic style, turns 41 this Sunday, June 21. Born in 1985.

angles.name: Queen of Melancholia
angles.copy: Happy 41st Birthday to the captivating Lana Del Rey this Sunday! Her unique sound continues to enchant fans worldwide.

angles.name: Summertime Sadness
angles.copy: Getting ready to celebrate Lana Del Rey's 41st this Sunday! Which of her iconic tracks is your ultimate favourite?

moments.title: Ray Davies of The Kinks Turns 82
moments.blurb: The legendary frontman and songwriter of The Kinks, Sir Ray Davies, celebrates his 82nd birthday this Sunday, June 21. Born in 1944.

angles.name: Kinks Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 82nd Birthday to the iconic Sir Ray Davies this Sunday! Thank you for the timeless music and unforgettable Kinks hits.

angles.name: Sunny Afternoon
angles.copy: From Waterloo Sunset to Lola, Ray Davies' songwriting shaped an era. Celebrate his 82nd this Sunday by cranking up The Kinks!

moments.title: Cyndi Lauper's 73rd Birthday
moments.blurb: The colourful and iconic pop star Cyndi Lauper, famous for hits like 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun', turns 73 this Monday, June 22. Born in 1953.

angles.name: Girls Just Wanna Have Fun
angles.copy: Happy 73rd Birthday to the one and only Cyndi Lauper this Monday! Her music and style are truly timeless.

angles.name: True Colors
angles.copy: Time After Time, Cyndi Lauper continues to inspire. Wishing a fantastic 73rd Birthday to a true music icon this Monday!

moments.title: Todd Rundgren Celebrates 78
moments.blurb: Innovative musician, songwriter, and producer Todd Rundgren, known for his diverse styles, turns 78 this Monday, June 22. Born in 1948.

angles.name: Musical Genius
angles.copy: Happy 78th Birthday to the multi-talented Todd Rundgren this Monday! A true pioneer in rock and pop.

angles.name: Hello It's Me
angles.copy: From Nazz to Utopia and a prolific solo career, Todd Rundgren's influence is immense. Celebrate his 78th Birthday this Monday!

moments.title: KT Tunstall Turns 51
moments.blurb: Scottish singer-songwriter KT Tunstall, known for hits like 'Suddenly I See', celebrates her 51st birthday this Tuesday, June 23. Born in 1975.

angles.name: Scottish Star
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the amazing KT Tunstall this Tuesday! Still loving 'Black Horse and the Cherry Tree'.

angles.name: Acoustic Pop
angles.copy: Wishing a fantastic 51st Birthday to Scotland's own KT Tunstall this Tuesday! What's your top track from her?

moments.title: Jason Mraz Celebrates 49
moments.blurb: Two-time Grammy winner Jason Mraz, famous for 'I'm Yours', celebrates his 49th birthday this Tuesday, June 23. Born in 1977.

angles.name: I'm Yours Forever
angles.copy: Happy 49th Birthday to the brilliant Jason Mraz this Tuesday! His feel-good anthems always brighten our day.

angles.name: Good Vibes
angles.copy: Wishing a wonderful 49th Birthday to Jason Mraz this Tuesday! Who's putting 'I'm Yours' on repeat to celebrate?

moments.title: Solange Knowles Turns 40
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning artist Solange Knowles, known for her experimental R&B and soul, celebrates her 40th birthday this Wednesday, June 24. Born in 1986.

angles.name: Creative Force
angles.copy: Happy 40th Birthday to the incredibly talented Solange Knowles this Wednesday! A true visionary in music and art.

angles.name: Modern Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a fabulous 40th Birthday to Solange this Wednesday! Her groundbreaking albums are a must-listen.

moments.title: Ariana Grande's 33rd Birthday
moments.blurb: Global pop superstar and Grammy winner Ariana Grande celebrates her 33rd birthday next Friday, June 26. Born in 1993.

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: Next Friday, we're celebrating the one and only Ariana Grande's 33rd Birthday! What's your ultimate Ari anthem?

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 33rd Birthday to Ariana Grande next Friday! From 'Thank U, Next' to 'Eternal Sunshine', she keeps delivering.

moments.title: Mick Jones of The Clash Turns 71
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist and songwriter Mick Jones, co-founder of The Clash and Big Audio Dynamite, celebrates his 71st birthday next Friday, June 26. Born in 1955.

angles.name: Punk Icon
angles.copy: Next Friday, we're raising a glass to Mick Jones of The Clash, who turns 71! What's your favourite Clash track?

angles.name: Rock & Roll Hall of Famer
angles.copy: From 'London Calling' to Big Audio Dynamite, Mick Jones is a true punk rock legend. Happy 71st Birthday next Friday!

moments.title: Nicole Scherzinger Turns 48
moments.blurb: Singer, actress, and TV personality Nicole Scherzinger, known for The Pussycat Dolls, celebrates her 48th birthday next Monday, June 29. Born in 1978.

angles.name: Pussycat Doll
angles.copy: Next Monday, we're wishing a very Happy 48th Birthday to the fabulous Nicole Scherzinger! Don't Cha wish your girlfriend was hot like her?

angles.name: Triple Threat
angles.copy: Singer, dancer, and TV star! Happy 48th Birthday to the multi-talented Nicole Scherzinger next Monday.
